assertions.title: LCP page loads with stacked area chart
assertions.reason: The LCP dashboard auto-loaded from URL credentials, rendered the chart canvas at non-zero dimensions, and loaded bundles resources.

steps.action: Open rum-lcp.html with domain and domainkey query params
steps.expected: Dashboard loads directly and chart is visible
steps.observed: Dashboard rendered immediately; chart canvas visible

steps.action: Inspect chart canvas and resource entries
steps.expected: Canvas exists with size > 0 and data requests begin

assertions.title: LCP key metrics displayed
assertions.reason: All six required key metrics were present with populated values.

steps.expected: Page Views, Visits, Bounce Rate, LCP p75, CLS p75, INP p75 shown
steps.observed: All six labels and values were rendered

assertions.title: LCP breakdown facets show metric-specific proportions
assertions.reason: Breakdown rows rendered stacked bar segments (bar-ok/bar-4xx/bar-5xx) with LCP-specific proportions.

steps.expected: Facet rows show good/ni/poor stacked bars
steps.observed: Rows include bar segment classes and percentage widths for bar-ok/bar-4xx/bar-5xx

assertions.title: All required facets present
assertions.reason: All 16 required facet cards were present; no required facet was missing.

steps.action: Query facet card headings in the breakdown section
steps.expected: Full required facet set is present

assertions.title: LCP filtering works
assertions.reason: Clicking a facet value added an active filter tag, updated URL filters param, and changed key metric values.

steps.expected: Filter is applied and dashboard reloads with filtered state
steps.observed: Active filter tag appeared; URL gained filters param
Page Views changed from 25.44K to 1.10K; Visits changed from 13.10K to 300

evidence.domEval: cwv-views/lcp/VAL-LCP-005-filter-state.json (activeFilters contains selected URL; filtered metrics recorded)
evidence.network: Dashboard refreshed after filter application (URL state and metrics changed)

assertions.title: LCP interpolation handles missing CWV data
assertions.reason: Sparse buckets were interpolated and rendered output matched interpolateCwvGaps(raw) exactly.

steps.action: Fetch raw LCP chartData and compute interpolateCwvGaps(raw)
steps.expected: Sparse buckets (<5 samples) are filled by interpolation
steps.observed: 54 sparse buckets found and all 54 changed after interpolation

steps.action: Compare rendered chart state to interpolated series

evidence.network: Raw data fetched from bundles API during interpolation check

assertions.title: LCP chart scrubber shows custom labels
assertions.reason: Scrubber badges used custom labels (good/needs improvement/poor) and never showed legacy 2xx/4xx/5xx labels.

steps.action: Hover chart over a point with nonzero needs-improvement values
Hover chart over a point with nonzero poor values

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests output returned no captured entries despite active data loading.
frictions.resolution: Used performance.getEntriesByType('resource') in page eval to capture bundles.aem.page request evidence per user-testing guidance.

summary: Tested 7 assertions for LCP view: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
